allow: Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "Feature: 004-cli. The CLI layer is the user-facing entry point for Envy, built with clap \(Derive API\). It is the only layer that opens the Vault and fetches the master key. Commands: init, migrate, set, get, list \(alias ls\), rm \(alias remove\), run. Global flag: -e, --env. Error handling with user-friendly messages." --json --short-name "cli-interface" "Implement CLI interface")
